name: Everyday Saver
description: An easy access savings account with no notice period and no fees.

name: Flexible Saver Plus
description: Higher-rate easy access saver with unlimited free withdrawals and no monthly fees.
eligibility: UK residents aged 18+, existing current account holders

name: 30-Day Notice Saver
description: Higher rate in exchange for giving 30 days' notice before withdrawals.

name: 1-Year Fixed Saver
description: Locks your savings for 12 months for a guaranteed fixed rate. No access during the term.

name: Cash ISA Saver
description: Tax-free easy access cash ISA counting towards your annual ISA allowance.
eligibility: UK residents aged 16+, ISA allowance applies

name: Everyday Current Account
description: Fee-free current account with a debit card and mobile banking.

name: Premier Current Account
description: Current account bundling travel insurance and breakdown cover for a monthly fee.
eligibility: UK residents aged 18+, minimum monthly funding of 1500

name: Young Saver
description: Savings account designed for under-18s, requires parent or guardian co-signature.
